Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Nova-Bots]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== The Captain ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 15''' — Nova-Bots are small brass humanoids.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 35''' — Mell has a Nova-Bot that is a tiny brass humanoid.}}

== The Engineer ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 6''' — Nova-Bots are giant robots used by Doctor Nova.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 8''' — Nova-Bots are robots associated with Doctor Nova.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 15''' — Mell's Nova-Bots are executed by the narrator.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 20''' — A hand-sized Nova-Bot exists.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 24''' — Nova-Bots are generally human in shape with a variable number of limbs.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 24''' — Nova-Bots typically feature a single blazing red eye.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 24''' — Nova-Bots are entities that assemble one another in a legion.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 29''' — A Nova-Bot is a small robot.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 30''' — Mell works with Nova-Bots.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 32''' — Nova-Bots are the size of human children and have fabricators on the end of their arms in place of hands.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 32''' — Nova-Bots are responsible for stitching the ship together.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 39''' — Nova-Bots are sweeping the system of debris.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 41''' — A tiny Nova-Bot provided Mell with a comforting pat.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 46''' — Nova-Bots streamed into the room with Starhammer and Leilari.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 47''' — Nova-Bots can be equipped with guns.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 47''' — Nova-Bots can be used as a cloud of micro-bots to infect weapons.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 47''' — Nova-Bots can be reassigned to perform repairs.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 47''' — Nova-Bots fill hallways with purple light from their eyes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 49''' — The narrator lost sight of the Nova-Bot while being tied into place.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 52''' — Nova Bots have purple eyes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 52''' — A massive Nova-Bot has bulky devices on its shoulders that project holograms.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 52''' — Starhammer blew the Nova-Bots apart.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 53''' — Mell uses Nova-Bots as decoys.}}

== The Knight ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 4''' — A Nova-Bot is a robot that can explode into molten metal.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 5''' — Nova-Bot crews are described as reliable by Shyrax.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 17''' — Nova-Bots are being printed by Mell's team.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 18''' — Mell cowered behind two larger Nova-Bots.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 22''' — A Nova-Bot held a box for Mell.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 23''' — A Nova-Bot is something Horizon suggests giving to Ark.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 28''' — Mell carries a glowing Nova-Bot used like a flashlight.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 32''' — A Nova-Bot with white flared armor and a single purple eye acts as a doctor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 33''' — Nova-Bots are used to watch the halls.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 36''' — Mell has fifteen Nova-Bots that can disable nearby ships.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 37''' — Mell utilized Nova-Bots and a robotic avatar.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 39''' — Nova-Bots are smooth, vaguely bird-shaped craft of dark metal.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 40''' — Nova-Bots are equipped with jetpacks.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 42''' — Mell can transfer components/data into a Nova-Bot.}}

== The Pilot ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 3''' — Nova-Bots are small robots used by Mell for piloting and combat.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 4''' — Mell's face is partially composed of a Nova-Bot metal frame.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 8''' — Nova-Bots can specialize in cracking network encryption.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 14''' — Mell requires Nova-Bots to function.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 14''' — Nova-Bots are mass-produced pilots for Karoshan ships.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 14''' — Nova-Bots are coordinated by Mell.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 15''' — Nova-Bots seized the Zenith Blade.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 18''' — Nova-Bots are automated crews in the hangar.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 19''' — Mell is assembling a Nova-Bot.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 20''' — Nova-Bots are silvery humanoid robots that can transform their hands into lasers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 20''' — Mell installs data cores into Nova-Bots.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 25''' — The Zenith Starship's army of Nova-Bots is missing.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 25''' — Nova-Bots are generally humanoid androids with single eyes that glow purple.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 30''' — Nova-Bots can be used to take biological samples.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 40''' — Nova-Bots can be used to log shipments.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 49''' — The connection to the Nova-Bots was lost.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
